sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ دَائِمًا جُزْءًا هَامًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija je oduvijek bila važan dio kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry has always been an important part of culture.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ الشُّعَرَاءُ عَنِ الْجَمَالِ وَالشَّجَاعَةِ وَالْحِكْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnici pišu o ljepoti, hrabrosti i mudrosti.
sentences.translationEn: Poets write about beauty, courage, and wisdom.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْقَصَائِدَ فِي الْمَجَالِسِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju pjesme na javnim skupovima.
sentences.translationEn: People read poems in public gatherings.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الشِّعْرُ عَلَى حِفْظِ التَّارِيخِ وَاللُّغَةِ.
sentences.translation: Poezija pomaže u očuvanju historije i jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Poetry helps in preserving history and language.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الطُّلَّابُ تَعَلُّمَ أَبْيَاتِ الشِّعْرِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti vole učiti stare stihove poezije.
sentences.translationEn: Students love learning old verses of poetry.
